text: Hello, how are you today?
Translate English to Chinese: The weather is nice.
Write a short poem about autumn.
ADATA-Trusta 是ADATA的企業級儲存產品, 提供伺服器等級的高效能儲存解決方案。包括 SSD, DRAM等

ADATA-Trusta is an enterprise storage solution of ADATA Technology Co., Ltd., a leading manufacturer of high-performance DRAM modules and NAND Flash products. Trusta offers a wide range of storage products including SSDs, external hard drives, and memory cards, designed to meet the needs of both consumers and businesses. With a focus on reliability, speed, and innovation, Trusta aims to provide cutting-edge storage solutions that enhance data management and accessibility for users worldwide.
